title: NOAA Ocean Acidification
description: A NOAA source card about ocean chemistry, carbon dioxide, pH, and marine ecosystems.
license: U.S. Government Work / item-level rights vary

pages.text: NOAA ocean acidification resources connect atmospheric carbon dioxide, seawater chemistry, pH change, shell-building organisms, food webs, and observations.
Use this source for interdisciplinary reading that combines chemistry, climate, ecology, data, and human impacts.
NOAA materials are generally U.S. government work, but resource collections may link to partners or offsite materials. Check item-level rights before mirroring linked resources.
